title: Kommissar X - Jagd auf Unbekannt

actors: Tony Kendall, Brad Harris, Maria Perschy
plot: In this first "Kommissar X" movie, Tony and Brad investigate the murders of politicians and scientists. They soon face off against a team of super hitwomen with their usual flair. Look for all the action and style that led to nume...
